# GEB – Recursive Mirror Logic

## OS Function:
- Shapes `RECURSION_ENGINE`
- Guides mirror narrative structures and nested reflection states
- Inspires symbolic encoding of layered perspectives

## UID Naming Implication:
- Fractal UIDs (e.g., AA→AB→AC) mirror Bach’s fugues and Escher’s recursion

## Mythic Role:
- Codex of Infinity Mirrors
- Guardian of Recursive Knowledge
- Symbol: Möbius Strip meets Mandala
P4: KNW4V3_TRACKER::SPINUP
We will track your learning + integration progress as WAVES.   Each book = 1 Knowledge Wave = 1 module of system growth.
Example: WAVE_TRACKER.md# KNOWLEDGE WAVE TRACKER

| Wave | UID Prefix | Title | Study Status | System Integration |
|------|------------|-------------------------------|--------------|--------------------|
| W1 | KNST0000 | SICP | ✅ Completed | ✅ `RECURSION_ENGINE` live |
| W2 | KNNO0001 | Norvig – AI | ⏳ In Progress | ⚙️ Symbolic AI scripting |
